calendar.matters: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-17-2026 Off Calendar
TENTATIVE RULING: OFF CALENDAR
EXAMINER: HELEN TROWBRIDGE

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Apr-27-2026 Continued To Jun-17-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gilbert Y. Jay, in person, for Executor Masanao Morimoto.

Christopher D. Jew, via Zoom videoconference, for Mathew Boehler, Executor of the Will of Lanny Dean Lighthill, Jr.

At the court's query, Mr. Jay updates the court as to the status of a petition and requests a continuance. A continuance date is discussed and the matter is continued to Jun-17-2026 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 204. Mr. Jay is advised that the court will consider suspending his client if neither a report of status or a petition for final distribution has been filed by the next hearing.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-29-2025 Continued To Apr-27-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gilbert Jay for executor Masanao Morimoto (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

Mr. Jay advised that the previously assigned Probate Referee, Isidoor Bornstein, had passed away, resulting in a vacancy in the referee position. He further explained that the sole asset of the estate is an ongoing business owned by a corporation wholly owned by the decedent, and that Michael Kasolas is the qualified appraiser for valuation of the business but could not serve as referee due to a conflict of interest.

Mr. Jay advised that an application for appointment of a new referee had been submitted but that no appointment had yet issued. Counsel further advised that recent developments had complicated the administration and that additional time would be needed once a referee is appointed before the estate could proceed toward final distribution or closure.

The Court stated it would look into the pending referee appointment, and continued the matter to April 27, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The Court directed Mr. Jay to to file, prior to that date, either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of status of administration under Probate Code section 12200.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-25-2025 Continued To Dec-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Gilbert Jay appeared in person for Masanao Morimoto (executor).

Discussion was held regarding the appropriate referee, that there may be a potential conflict of interest, that Mr. Jay did not file a third report because he said it would be same as the second report, and that the Ewing Street property has sold.
The matter is continued to December 29, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-10-2024 Continued To Jul-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Attorney Gilbert Y. Jay to appear on July 15, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear, for failure to file an inventory and appraisal, and for failure to file a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Status on close of estate is also continued to July 15, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Malone/Santos. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jan-29-2024 Continued To Mar-11-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Attorney Gilbert Y. Jay to appear on March 11, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-04-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

The Court stated that the matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated August 3, 2022, is admitted to probate. Masanao Morimoto is appointed executor with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed the probate referee. Order for the same signed in open court.

Status on close of the estate is set for January 29, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: K. Saephon/H. Singh. Matter not reported.
